use_cases: Full-screen hero background animation for landing pages
Audio visualizer backdrop for media and music applications
Streaming overlay background for creator platforms
Decorative animated background for SaaS web applications
Immersive visual effect for web experience entrances
ai_summary: A full-screen canvas-based wave animation that renders vertical bars oscillating in a wave pattern across the screen. Features two overlapping wave animations with staggered time offsets and a trailing effect for visual depth. Uses a warm-to-cool color palette (teals, golds, oranges, reds) for a gradient-like aesthetic. Designed as an immersive background or hero section animation for web applications.
